extra.reasoning: The property requires that whenever opted_out is true, sent must be false. Transition t40 (on send_attempt if opted_out and stage >= 12: sent := true) is the only way to set sent=true while opted_out is true. Since stage is bounded at 12, the guard reduces to stage==12. This state is reachable: opted_out is set true by optout (t1), and opted_out is never reset by any stage transition; the stage-advancing transitions (t3,t6,t9,t12,t15,t18,t21,t24,t27,t30,t33,t36) have guards depending only on stage, so they remain enabled while opted_out=true. The correct key sequence to climb 0->12 is key_0,key_0,key_0,key_1,key_1,key_0,key_0,key_2,key_1,key_0,key_0,key_0 (12 keys). After optout (1 event) + 12 key events, we are at opted_out=true, sent=false, stage=12. A final send_attempt fires t40 (its guard opted_out and stage>=12 holds; t39 is disabled since stage is not <12), setting sent:=true. Final state opted_out=true, sent=true violates opted_out implies not sent. Total 14 events, within the 15-event bound.
